name: @coivitas/conformance-test-suite
description: Coivitas conformance test suite — standalone publishable package with CLI (coivitas-conformance)

scripts.copy-fixtures: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const conformanceRoot=path.resolve(__dirname,'../../tests/fixtures/conformance');const src030=path.join(conformanceRoot,'v0.3.0');const dst030=path.resolve(__dirname,'fixtures/v0.3.0');const dstBaseline=path.resolve(__dirname,'fixtures/baseline');if(fs.existsSync(src030)){fs.mkdirSync(dst030,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src030)){if(f.endsWith('.json')){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src030,f),path.join(dst030,f));console.log('copied',f,'→ fixtures/v0.3.0/');}}}else{console.warn('WARN: source fixture dir not found (monorepo only):',src030);}if(fs.existsSync(conformanceRoot)){fs.mkdirSync(dstBaseline,{recursive:true});let count=0;for(const e of fs.readdirSync(conformanceRoot,{withFileTypes:true})){if(e.isFile&&e.name.endsWith('.json')){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(conformanceRoot,e.name),path.join(dstBaseline,e.name));console.log('copied',e.name,'→ fixtures/baseline/');count++;}}if(count===0){console.warn('WARN: no baseline .json files found in conformance root:',conformanceRoot);}}else{console.warn('WARN: conformance root not found (monorepo only):',conformanceRoot);}"
